title: vitis balansana var. tomentosa
intro: Vitis balansana var. tomentosa, also known as the hairy Chinese wild grape, is a type of plant species within the Vitis genus. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis balansana var. tomentosa include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antiviral agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
